seoTitle: How to Add a Support Email Address in Zendesk
metaDescription: Learn how to add email in Zendesk, whether creating a native subdomain alias or connecting an external company mailbox with forwarding and verification.
intro: Running support through a single generic inbox makes it hard to scale or keep branding consistent. Zendesk lets you add dedicated support addresses either as native subdomain aliases or by connecting your own company domain. This guide covers both paths, plus how to verify and set a default sending address.

steps.heading: Open the email channel settings
steps.body: In Admin Center, expand the Channels sidebar and select the Email settings panel.

steps.heading: Create a native Zendesk address
steps.body: Click Add Address to activate a clean folder prefix, like billing@ or sales@, directly on your account subdomain.

steps.heading: Or connect an external domain
steps.body: Choose Connect External Address instead if you want to keep your existing professional company email address and branding.

steps.heading: Configure mail forwarding
steps.body: If using an external address, set up your mail server to forward messages to the unique Zendesk token provided.

steps.heading: Verify the connection
steps.body: Complete the security verification checks so your new mailbox status switches to verified.

steps.heading: Set your default address
steps.body: Choose which verified address should be the default sender for outbound message updates.

faq.question: What's the difference between a native address and an external one?
faq.answer: A native address uses your Zendesk account subdomain, while an external address lets you keep your own company domain and forward mail into Zendesk.

faq.question: Do I need to change anything on my mail server?
faq.answer: Only if you're connecting an external domain, in which case you need to set up forwarding rules to route messages to Zendesk.

faq.question: Why does my new address show as unverified?
faq.answer: Verification tokens can take a few minutes to process, and forwarding rules must be correctly configured for the check to succeed.

faq.question: Can I have multiple support addresses?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add several native or external addresses and route them to different brands or business rule triggers.
